description: Perform an ABC inventory analysis for the year 2013 on the AdventureWorks database to classify products based on their contribution to total sales revenue using the Pareto Principle. Create a schema named 'Inventory' and a view 'Inventory.vw_ABC_Classification_2013' that lists all products from Production.Product, including those with no sales. The view must contain the columns ProductID, Name, TotalRevenue (sum of LineTotal for 2013), CumulativePct (running total of revenue / grand total), and ABC_Class. Apply classification logic where 'A' represents items contributing up to 80% of revenue, 'B' represents items contributing the next 15% (80% < pct <= 95%), and 'C' represents the remaining items (> 95%) and items with $0 revenue. Export the 'A' class items, ordered by revenue descending, to /home/ga/Documents/exports/class_a_priority.csv with headers for ProductID, Name, TotalRevenue, and ABC_Class.
